title: Derive E12: parent closure identity Div E_parent = B_closed + B_relax
description: E12 is the main missing result. E_parent, B_closed, and B_relax must be defined and derived from vacuum ontology. This identity must imply A constraint propagation, W_i sourcing, h_TT radiation, kappa trace relaxation, exterior mass preservation, and ordinary Sigma_creation = 0.
